overview: SupportAI is an AI-powered customer support SaaS platform with knowledge base RAG, website training, AI playground, embeddable chat widget, CRM enhancements, live human handoff, feedback system, exports, email templates, PWA support, and comprehensive UI/UX polish.
features: AI customer support chat with conversation memory
Knowledge base RAG with document upload and semantic search
AI playground for prompt and personality configuration
Embeddable chat widget for business websites
CRM with tags, notes, and customer insights
Export to PDF, Excel, and CSV
Glassmorphism UI with animations and toast notifications
